---
title: ""
page-layout: article
---

# Hema Balarama

MRes in Economics Candidate, Department of Economics, London School of Economics and Political Science  
{.meta}

Hema is an MRes Economics student on the MRes/PhD Economics programme. Her research interests lie in development, environmental, and labour economics.
{.lead}

MA in Economics (University of Toronto); BComm (Hons) in Econometrics and Economics (Monash University). Previously, predoctoral researcher at the Yale Economic Growth Center.

[Email](mailto:h.balarama@lse.ac.uk) | [Research](research/index.qmd) | [Teaching](teaching/index.qmd)
